data.title: Aster responds to the abnormal XPL contract price spike: User funds are safe and affected users will be compensated
data.description: The price of the XPL perpetual contract on the Aster platform briefly rose to $4 and is now trading at $1.37. Aster responded that it has noticed unusual price fluctuations in this trading pair and that user funds are safe. The team is conducting a comprehensive investigation and will compensate affected users for their losses.

data.title: Crypto Whales Bought These 3 Altcoins In The Final Week Of September 2025
data.description:
Bitcoin’s steady decline this week, culminating in its dip below the critical $110,000 level yesterday, has severely dampened broader market sentiment.   The pullback has gradually pushed many altcoins to multi-week lows, creating strategic accumulation opportunities for large investors. Amid this, crypto whales have been buying select altcoins, signaling renewed confidence in specific tokens. This piece examines some of them
source: https://beincrypto.com/altcoins-crypto-whales-buying-last-week-of-september/

data.title: Russia Reportedly Uses Crypto To Influence Eastern European Elections
data.description:
A new report details on-chain data and leaked texts from A7, a firm that specializes in sanctions evasion. Apparently, the company interfered in Moldovan elections to Russia’s benefit. These leaks do not contain a direct smoking gun connecting the Kremlin to A7, but tokens fund polling, activist networks, politicians, and more. It seems impossible that the government has no knowledge or involvement in these activities
source: https://beincrypto.com/russia-election-interference-crypto-a7-moldova/

data.title: Global payments network Swift looks at migrating messaging system on-chain with Linea
data.description:
Swift, the payments network that keeps global banking running, is dipping its toes into blockchain. The company is testing whether its core messaging system, the mechanism that allows more than 11,000 banks to securely talk to each other, could one day run on-chain. The experiment, reported by Grégory Raymond of The Big Whale on X, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/swift-migrating-messaging-system-with-linea/

data.title: Coinbase CLO Says Base Is “Not an Exchange” Amid SEC Scrutiny
data.description:
Coinbase has argued that Base is blockchain infrastructure rather than an exchange, as discussion over Layer-2 sequencers has intensified. The network has explored a token, opened a Solana bridge, and has seen TVL and activity rise.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/coinbase-clo-says-base-is-not-an-exchange-amid-sec-scrutiny/

data.title: Markets show signs of caution as risk-seeking traders pull back
data.description:

Day traders who fueled rallies in everything from tech stocks to cryptocurrency are now pulling money out of the most speculative […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/markets-show-signs-of-caution-as-risk-seeking-traders-pull-back/
